content.query:
DROP TABLE [EDW].[FACT_CALL]
GO

SET ANSI_NULLS ON
GO
SET QUOTED_IDENTIFIER ON
GO

CREATE TABLE [EDW].[FACT_CALL]
( 
	[CallID] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[CustomerID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LeadID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[AgentEmployeeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallResultID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Phone] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[CallDate] [datetime2](7)  NULL,
	[LP_CallID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CustomerID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_LeadID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_AgentEmployeeID] [int]  NULL,
	[LP_CallTypeID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[LP_CallResultID] [nvarchar](100)  NULL,
	[Division] [nvarchar](100)  NOT NULL,
	[LastUpdateTS] [datetime2](7)  NOT NULL
)
WITH
(
	DISTRIBUTION = HASH ( [CallID] ),
	CLUSTERED COLUMNSTORE INDEX
)
GO
